---
name: Roadmap epic
about: Track a master-roadmap issue with acceptance criteria, tests, and corpus evidence.
title: "[Roadmap] "
labels: roadmap
assignees: ""
---

## Issue id

Reference the canonical backlog entry from `guides/backlog/roadmap-issue-backlog.md`.

## Phase

List the roadmap phase number and title.

## Problem

Describe the gap in the current repository, not just the desired implementation.

## Scope

- implementation surfaces
- docs or registry surfaces
- corpus or rollout surfaces

## Out of scope

- explicitly list what this issue must not absorb

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] code or docs changes are explicit
- [ ] fixture coverage is explicit
- [ ] corpus or promotion evidence expectations are explicit when relevant
- [ ] sync or CI expectations are explicit when relevant

## Validation

List the exact commands, test files, or corpus targets required before closing the issue.

## Dependencies

List any roadmap issues or guides that must land first.
